texto: What I hadn't expected was to be blindsided by a history lesson that betrayed every hard-won experience I'd had as a player and now a coach at the same school I'd attended. . . Whoever was responsible for sending a championship team into virtual obscurity was either a serious egomaniac or just plain mean. It stung.After all, wasn't the story told at today's funeral the stuff of legacies? Of school lore passed on to the next class, and the next, building institutional pride as well as magical identities that made every kid in the state want to play there?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jo Kadlecek que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “What I hadn't expected was to be blindsided by a history lesson that betrayed every hard-won expe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, champions, girls, com foco em termino e girls.
